title: DougDougModdedModded: Create Aeronautics
description: Official modpack for the Modded OffSeason server on the DougDougServerServer.
body:
# DougDoug ModdedModded: Create Aeronautics This is the official modpack for the modded server on DougDougServerServer. Please note that the server is only available to Twitch subscribers, Nitro Boosters, or Channel Point Redeemers of DougDoug, however the modpack itself is available to anyone. This is a neoforge modpack focus around [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics), with the addition of the two winning mods from the SkyDougle Event, [Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight) & [DougDoug MugMug](https://modrinth.com/mod/dougdoug-mugmug-modmod) - Recommended Oracle GraalVM 21.
Java args / 3-4 GB RAM (Lower end): -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1
Java args / 6-10 GM RAM (Higher end): -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+UseNUMA -XX:ZUncommitDelay=300 -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize=512M -XX:NonNMethodCodeHeapSize=12M -XX:ProfiledCodeHeapSize=256M -XX:NonProfiledCodeHeapSize=244M -Dfml.readTimeout=90 -Dfml.loginTimeout=90 -Djava.awt.headless=false
**A note from Create: Aeronautic's wiki:** Every contraption, farm, and flying assembly shares the world’s time budget. If TPS is bad, schedule simple machines off-hours, build smaller, or move heavy automation to a less crowded area. A server is a shared living room, not a private benchmark. Includes mods such as: - [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) - [Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight) - [DougDoug MugMug](https://modrinth.com/mod/dougdoug-mugmug-modmod) - [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere) - [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture) - [Overweight Farming](https://modrinth.com/mod/overweight-farming) - [Born in Chaos](https://modrinth.com/mod/borninchaos) - [More culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [Ramadan Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ramadan-delight) - [Veggie's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/veggies-delight)
Apex Hosting is graciously sponsoring our server! Use https://apexhost.gg/dougdoug to get a Server Today! Modpack icon by [rabbitmilk.](https://rbtmilk.neocities.org/)
